name: oap-reminder
description: Create, list, complete, and manage personal reminders with due dates and recurrence. Use for requests like 'remind me to call the dentist Friday', 'what reminders are due today', 'show my overdue reminders', 'set a weekly reminder to check backups'. Supports one-time and recurring reminders (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly).

input.description: JSON body for creating reminders. Required: 'title'. Optional: 'notes', 'due_date' (YYYY-MM-DD), 'due_time' (HH:MM), 'recurring' ('daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'yearly').

output.description: JSON reminder object with id, title, notes, due_date, due_time, recurring, status (pending/completed), created_at, completed_at.
